content:
# GitHub Primer - Overview

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: developer tool empty state, repository feature empty, docs/product first use, no content
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/blankslate/

Visual traits:
- developer-focused
- plain
- direct
- actionable
- GitHub-like

Use when:
- developer tool empty state
- repository feature empty
- docs/product first use
- no content

Avoid when:
- commerce onboarding
- luxury landing page
- data-loading skeleton

AI summary: Use Primer Blankslate for developer-product empty states: small visual, concise heading, explanatory description, and a clear creation/start action.

# GitHub Primer - Layout Rules

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: developer tool empty state, repository feature empty, docs/product first use, no content
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/blankslate/

- Explain why content is missing in a concise heading and description.
- Use a primary action to create or start the missing resource.
- Use narrow or spacious variants based on surrounding density.

AI summary: Use Primer Blankslate for developer-product empty states: small visual, concise heading, explanatory description, and a clear creation/start action.

# GitHub Primer - Component Patterns

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: developer tool empty state, repository feature empty, docs/product first use, no content
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/blankslate/

- visual icon
- heading
- description
- primary action
- secondary action
- narrow variant
- spacious variant

AI summary: Use Primer Blankslate for developer-product empty states: small visual, concise heading, explanatory description, and a clear creation/start action.

# GitHub Primer - Interaction States

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: developer tool empty state, repository feature empty, docs/product first use, no content
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/blankslate/

- no wiki
- no repository content
- first creation
- learn more

AI summary: Use Primer Blankslate for developer-product empty states: small visual, concise heading, explanatory description, and a clear creation/start action.

# GitHub Primer - Accessibility Notes

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: developer tool empty state, repository feature empty, docs/product first use, no content
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/blankslate/

- The action should be an actual link or button with clear text.
- The visual icon should support the message, not replace text.

AI summary: Use Primer Blankslate for developer-product empty states: small visual, concise heading, explanatory description, and a clear creation/start action.

# GitHub Primer - Implementation Hints

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: developer tool empty state, repository feature empty, docs/product first use, no content
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/blankslate/

- Use for developer tools and GitHub-like product surfaces.
- Keep copy utilitarian and avoid excessive illustration.

AI summary: Use Primer Blankslate for developer-product empty states: small visual, concise heading, explanatory description, and a clear creation/start action.
